scripts.vis:check: node --import ./tests/support/three-preload.mjs tests/vis_module_load.test.mjs && npx eslint -c tools/flowboard/eslint.config.mjs tools/flowboard/js/vis/ && node --import ./tests/support/three-preload.mjs tests/vis_render_tick.test.mjs
scripts.vis:check:smoke: for t in tests/vis_*.test.mjs; do echo "--- $t ---" && node --import ./tests/support/three-preload.mjs "$t" || exit 1; done
scripts.vis:check:all: npm run vis:check && npm run vis:check:invariant && npm run vis:check:grep && npm run vis:check:smoke
